violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. Plastic dish used for microwave heating of sauces/gravy. Discard melted/pocking dish and replace with microwave safe container.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Store fabric softener bottle away from single service items. Store spray battles of cleaners below clean equipment at dish row.
